motion: Should PR #28: epic: Frontend Scaffold & Integration be merged as-is into main?

findings.description: No table navigation UI — selectTable unreachable after mount, users stuck on first table
findings.rationale: Scaffold PR scope — Sidebar children slot is ready, selectTable is wired, table list component is a T-next task

findings.description: Setup mode disconnected — isSetup hardcoded false, frontend never renders setup wizard
findings.rationale: Setup wizard is Epic 5 scope per App.svelte:51 comment

findings.description: Mock total_rows misrepresents actual data — page 2 returns empty rows with inflated total_rows count
findings.rebuttal_rejection_reason: Questioner verified page 2 returns [] while StatusBar shows 51-100 of 427,229
findings.fix: Set total_rows to the actual generated/filtered row count instead of row_count_estimate

findings.description: Justfile build recipe doesn't pin VITE_MOCK=false — environment contamination possible
findings.risk_note: Requires explicit export VITE_MOCK=true in shell; strict equality gate prevents undefined from matching

findings.description: CDN font dependency contradicts single-binary deployment
findings.dismissed_reason: Factually wrong — fonts are npm-bundled via @fontsource-variable imports in main.ts:1-2

findings.description: CORS allows Any methods and Any headers
findings.rationale: Origin predicate restricts to localhost; limited blast radius for local-only tool

findings.description: content.data.to_vec() clones embedded bytes on every static asset request
API error handling discards server error body — statusText empty in HTTP/2
No runtime validation of API response shapes — res.json() as Promise<T>
Setup mode hardcodes bind address, ignores config

merge_conditions: Fix mock total_rows to match actual generated/filtered row count (finding 3)
Pin VITE_MOCK=false in Justfile build recipe (finding 4)
follow_up_issues: Add table navigation list component in Sidebar (finding 1 — HIGH priority)
Wire isSetup to backend API detection for setup mode (finding 2 — HIGH priority)
Restrict CORS to GET method and explicit headers (finding 6)
Avoid to_vec() clone in embed.rs — use Cow/Bytes directly (finding 7)
Read response body in apiFetch error path (finding 8)
Add runtime validation for API responses (finding 9)
Setup mode: read bind addr from env or partial config (finding 10)

questioner_overrides.reason: Fonts are npm-bundled via @fontsource-variable imports in main.ts:1-2

questioner_overrides.claim: Mock total_rows correctly models real DB pagination
questioner_overrides.reason: Page 2 returns [] while showing 51-100 of 427,229 — real DB would have actual rows
